input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.3.3
            TITLE: rear aerodynamic zone

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.3.3: Rear Aerodynamic Zone
T.7.3.3 Rear Aerodynamic Zone 
The volume that is: 
• Rearward of the Head Restraint Plane 
• Inboard of two vertical planes parallel to the centerline of the chassis touching the inside 
of the rear tires at the height of the hub centerline

final_answer: rule T.7.3.3: Rear Aerodynamic Zone T.7.3.3 Rear Aerodynamic Zone The volume that is: • Rearward of the Head Restraint Plane • Inboard of two vertical planes parallel to the centerline of the chassis touching the inside of the rear tires at the height of the hub centerline
